description: List of skills.sh skills to install for claude-goodness setup

skills.name: grill-me
skills.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding

skills.name: find-skills
skills.description: Helps discover and install agent skills when looking for functionality

skills.name: teach-me
skills.description: Break down any topic, article, code, or document into simple explanations and reinforce learning with a multiple choice quiz
